The '''Battle of Dromund Kaas''' was one of the opening battles of the [[Light and Darkness War]], in [[1004 BBY]]. In a similar way to the [[Battle of Malrev IV (1004 BBY)|Battle of Malrev IV]] that took place around the same time, the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] landed an army to occupy the planet but they were repelled by a violent [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] counterattack.<ref name="TEA" /> It was one of the major battles of the [[New Sith Wars]].

{{Battle-stub}}
